text:
Where a patient is undergoing restorative speech-language pathology services, routine 
reevaluations are considered to be a part of the therapy and cannot be billed as a 
separate visit. 

2. The services of a speech-language pathologist would be covered if they are needed as 
a result of an illness or injury and are directed towards specific speech/voice 
production. 

3. Speech-language pathology would be covered where a skilled service can only be 
provided by a speech-language pathologist
